query:
-- Get full service context for the 7 negative-margin customers
-- Look at all their services to understand what the "Other" $49 service is
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.serviceTypeDetail,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.supplierName,
  s.dataSource,
  s.costSource,
  s.simSerialNumber,
  s.dataPlanGb,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId IN (
  -- The 7 negative-margin $49 customers
  'C0214', -- Salter Brothers
  'C0003', -- Active Living
  'C0235', -- Swara
  'C0091', -- Fast Cut Qld
  'C0044', -- Bracken Ridge Family Practice
  'C0271', -- True Metal Solutions
  'C2893'  -- Nicki's Security Screens
)
AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.serviceTypeDetail, s.monthlyCost, 
         s.monthlyRevenue, s.supplierName, s.dataSource, s.costSource, s.simSerialNumber, 
         s.dataPlanGb, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY s.customerExternalId;

  s.dataPlanGb,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId IN (
  -- The 7 negative-margin $49 customers
  'C0214', -- Salter Brothers
  'C0003', -- Active Living
  'C0235', -- Swara
  'C0091', -- Fast Cut Qld
  'C0044', -- Bracken Ridge Family Practice
  'C0271', -- True Metal Solutions
  'C2893'  -- Nicki's Security Screens
)
AND s.monthlyCost = 49.00
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.serviceTypeDetail, s.monthlyCost, 
         s.monthlyRevenue, s.supplierName, s.dataSource, s.costSource, s.simSerialNumber, 
         s.dataPlanGb, s.customerExternalId
ORDER BY s.customerExternalId;
